DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT JORGENSON, JON

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JORGENSON, JON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 27 MALTA DR, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL APR-14-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, PL. PAYS DEF. $500 BY CHECK MAILED 3-7-94. PL. RETAINS SEC. DEP. DEF. WAIVES ALL CLAIMS. NO FURTHER STAYS. PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. PREMISES TO BE LEFT VACANT. IF DEF. VACATES BY AGREEMENT, PL. WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DISM W/PREJUDICE IF DEF. PREPARES PROPER PAPERS.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT JORGENSON, JON
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT CRAY, RICHARD HUBBARD, RICK

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JORGENSON, JON
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YIP, CHUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT JORGENSON, JON CRAY, RICHARD HUBBARD, RICK DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/THOMAS HUSTER AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTIOIN OF PREMISES AT 27 MALTA DR, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 4-14-94, 11:59PM - RENT & DAMAGES WVD. - EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & ATTY FEES - SECURITY DEPOSIT RETAINED BY PL. - PL. TO PAY DEF. $500 TODAY - MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS - NO FURTHER STAYS - POSSESSIONS LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED - RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED - DEF. STIP. THERE ARE NO OTHER ADULTS W/RIGHT OF POSSESSION - UPON VACATING PL. AGREES TO S/A JUDGMENT & DISM ACTION NUNC PRO TUNC. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
